title: hpds audit: dirty-files
body:
<!-- hpds-audit:fingerprint:0bc36597da4cb3e1 -->
The scheduled `hpds audit` of `acme/demo` reported an error:

- **check:** `dirty-files`
- **finding:** 2 tracked files have uncommitted changes
- **fix:** commit or stash them

_Filed by `hpds audit report-github`; it will be closed automatically once a scheduled audit no longer reports this finding._

title: hpds audit: junk-files
body:

title: Tracking: overall repo hygiene
body: A human filed this under the hpds-audit label; the bot must leave it alone.
